name: rfc-review-ops
description: Deep operational-concerns review of a technical RFC — build system impact, packaging, CI, observability, performance-in-production, deployment, capacity, and failure modes. Focused follow-up to /rfc-review, or standalone for ops-shaped RFCs.
author: Claude Code

usage.description: Deep operational pass on a single RFC: build, packaging, CI, observability, perf, rollout, capacity, failure modes.
